# getObjectProperty()

```ts
function getObjectProperty(value: unknown, key: string): unknown;
```

Defined in: [testing/utility/reflect.utility.ts:15](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/1df9da293b0f83cbdcf2bdd1886c4a53f0e3e2c8/src/app/testing/utility/reflect.utility.ts#L15)

Safely reads a property from an unknown value using reflection.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type      | Description                 |
| --------- | --------- | --------------------------- |
| `value`   | `unknown` | The value to read from.     |
| `key`     | `string`  | The property key to access. |

## Returns

`unknown`

The property value, or `undefined` if the value is not an object.
